name: Borgatti Field
description: Borgatti Field is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Agawam, MA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Field Club of Longmeadow
description: Field Club of Longmeadow is a place to play pickleball in Longmeadow, MA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Greenwood Center
description: Greenwood Center is a place to play pickleball in Longmeadow, MA. There are 7 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hampton Ponds Playground
description: Come play pickleball at Hampton Ponds Playground in Westfield, MA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Holy Name Social Center
description: Come play pickleball at Holy Name Social Center in Springfield, MA! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: LTC
description: Come play pickleball at LTC in Ludlow, MA! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Mittenauge park
description: Come play pickleball at Mittenauge park in West Springfield, MA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Municipal Field Playground
description: Municipal Field Playground is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, MA. There are 14 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Pickleball City
description: Pickleball City is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Springfield, MA. There are 9 indoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, and food.

name: Springfield JCC
description: Springfield JCC is a place to play pickleball in Springfield, MA. There are 11 wood and asphalt courts. 3 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, water, youth programming, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: The Picklr Westfield
description: The Picklr Westfield is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, MA. There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, restrooms, water, locker rooms, and a pro shop or equipment store. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Trinity United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Trinity United Methodist Church in Springfield, MA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.
fees: Fee required — I need to know where to go.

name: Unico Building Mitteneauge Park West Springfield
description: Courts need to be reserved through the West Springfield park & rec dept.

name: Westfield Boys & Girls Club
description: Westfield Boys & Girls Club is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, MA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Westfield High School
description: Come play pickleball at Westfield High School in Westfield, MA! There are 8 asphalt courts. 2 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: White Oak School
description: White Oak School is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, MA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: YMCA Greater Westfield
description: YMCA Greater Westfield is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, MA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court can be reserved. A membership is required to play.
